topic_text: When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. Set Home Temp based on Weather. If Outside Temp Drops below certain degrees, set home temperature accordingly.

When Temperature drops below from Nest Thermostat, do Activate Scene using Hunter Douglas PowerView. If temperature in the home drops below 65ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ°F, open your shades. If your Nest thermostat detects the temperature in the home is below 65ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ°, open your shades to let sunshine heat the room.

When Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground, do Set temperature to a permanent hold using Honeywell Lyric. Automatically turn on A/C if the temperature gets too hot. If current temperature rises above 80ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ°F, then set temperature to 72ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ°F.

When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Set TRV Position 5 using LightwaveRF Heating. Fully open a LightwaveRF TRV when the temperature gets cold. Don't worry about a cold house when the temperature drops by making your LightwaveRF TRVs fully open automatically.
When Sunrise from Weather Underground, do Set a zone temperature using Honeywell Single-zone Thermostat. If sunrise, then set a zone temperature. If sunrise, then set a zone temperature

When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. Automatically turn off AC if it's cool outside. If it is warm inside your house but cool outside, then you are wasting energy if the AC is runningUse this to stop it, and open your windows instead!This will set your target temperature to a higher value (set it high enough that you know it will stop cooling) when the temperature outside your house drops to a temperature you specify.
When Lock unlocked from August, do Set temperature range using Nest Thermostat. August lock change temp. When August lock is unlocked, Nest thermostat changes to specified range

When Lock locked by specific person from August, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. Set Nest Thermostat temperature when you leave home. When you lock your August Lock, automatically set Nest Thermostat to a certain temperature.

When Device is plugged in from Android Battery, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. Turn down the temperature when I go to bed. Like most people, when I go to bed, I plug in my phoneWith this Applet, I no longer need to remember to turn down the thermostat once I crawl into bed for the night!

When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Start a zone using RainMachine. Heated Sidewalks Example. This will start a zone if the temperature drops below freezingChange as needed to suit your specific device.

When Every day at from Date & Time, do Set mode using Wattio THERMIC. Set your Wattio Thermic mode at certain time (i.e. off at 0:00)I use it to make sure Wattio Thermic is OFF every day at 0:00, so it doesn't matter if anyone put it in manual mode during the day

When Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground, do Start a program using RainMachine. Start watering using RainMachine on high temperatures. Start a specific program if temperature rises above a specific value.
When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. Nest Weather aware. set your Nest thermostat to a minimum temperature if the weather turns cold

When Tomorrow's high rises above from Weather Underground, do Set temperature range using Nest Thermostat. Drop Nest Like It's Hot. Lower your Nest thermostat cooling setpoint if tomorrow's forecast high will be above a certain temperature.
When Someone talks to a conversation from Roger, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. Turn the air up. Use Roger to verbally change your nest thermostat temperature.

When The security panel has been armed from HomeControl Flex, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. Change the temperature when I leave for the day.. When you arm your system don't waste time waiting for your thermostat to determine you are goneSet the temperature automatically with this recipe.

When Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground, do Enable a quick action using Honeywell evohome. change to summer settings. Turn the heating to summer when the temp goes over 14degrees

When Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground, do Enable a quick action using Honeywell evohome. Sun's out, Heating off!. This is an automatic trigger for evohome to automatically select 'heating off' as you enter the summer, or a sunny period
